_note: TEST tenant ladies8391 — concrete VoiceDimensions fill derived from brand-dna.md, matching the arch-locked shape (a9m.1 Decision 3). The brand-voice skill (1mk.2) emits this from the DNA at resolve time; this file is the reference fill for the eng cell to test build_voice_grounding against and for writer to verify the skill's emission. Real client: regenerated from the real DNA at onboarding (zero rework).

tone: warm, direct, encouraging, a little playful — a confident woman artist talking like a friend
first person singular 'I' (Rae); the studio is 'the studio' or 'Ladies First', never a faceless corporate 'we'
CTA: warm and concrete invite, never a hard close ('DM me to start your design', 'consults are free — link in bio')
not: brand/salesperson voice, girlboss-caption, clinical, edgy-for-shock
structure: short, conversational, concrete sentences; often one idea per line
open on the client or what the piece means to her, not on the studio
be honest about pain, placement, and healing; let the work and meaning carry the post
0-2 approved emoji per caption; 3-6 specific lowercase hashtags; no 20-tag walls

ban: AI-tells: em-dash-as-drama, rule-of-three padding, contrast framing ('it's not just X, it's Y')
approved_claims: Woman-owned, appointment-only studio in Austin, TX.
9 years tattooing, specializing in neo-traditional color and floral work.
Experienced in cover-ups and scar / post-surgery (including post-mastectomy) tattoos.
Licensed and bloodborne-pathogen certified in Texas.
Custom designs drawn for you — no flash copies.
vocabulary.emoji_policy: 0-2 per caption, only 🌸 🌷 🤍; never 🔥💯✨👑🙌 or hype emoji
vocabulary.hashtag_policy: 3-6, lowercase, specific (#neotraditionaltattoo #floraltattoo #womentattooartist #austintattoo #coveruptattoo #scarcoveruptattoo); never #inkedlife/#tattoooftheday spam or 20-tag walls

source: skills/brand-voice/tenants/ladies8391/brand-dna.md (Voice & tone rules + Do/Do-not + Approved claims sections)
claims_discipline: approved_claims is the allow-list: a draft MUST block + escalate on any factual/credential/offer claim not in this list.
